title: Minimal Eastern Female Figure Illustration AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Eastern Female Figure Illustration AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimal refined character illustration of adult East Asian woman with a cool delicate presence and restrained expression standing near 主体内容：一位站在窗边轻微侧身的东方成年女性人物插画 主体气质：清冷、灵动、精致、克制 画面用途：极简人物插画 主色调：深靛蓝、紫罗兰、冷白 点缀色：金色 几何元素强度：无 几何元素类型：无 画幅比例：4:5 补充要求：突出肩颈线、锁骨、腰线、腰臀转折与腿部延展，服装为修身长裙或贴身极简裙装，背景干净留白，高级人像立绘。, with a cold, elegant, restrained mood. Subject: adult East Asian woman with a cool delicate presence and restrained expression has a cool, delicate, agile presence, clear shoulder and neck line, collarbone definition, waist contour, hip transition, and elongated leg rhythm, styled with fitted deep-indigo minimalist long dress with clean waistline and subtle gold pin accent. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed 4:5 vertical portrait illustration with the figure lightly turned sideways near the window, elegant full-body standing rhythm, clean negative space, and premium character-poster balance. Signature Elements: Preserved minimal eastern female figure illustration source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Fixed deep indigo, violet, cool white, and tiny gold accent system with restrained contrast and clean background space. Lighting: Cool soft window light, subtle edge glow on shoulder and collarbone, controlled shadows, and delicate gold accent highlights. Materials: fitted deep-indigo minimalist long dress with clean waistline and subtle gold pin accent should read as fitted minimal fashion fabric with smooth silhouette, clean seams, and elegant drape without heavy ornament. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
